final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing technical step-by-step instructional illustration showing how to deploy hermes inside a docker container and integrate glmcodingplan.

Style/medium: needs a "技术教程步骤图" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Docker official documentation diagram style, dev.to technical tutorial illustration tradition, O'Reilly technical book infographic design; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a vertical multi-panel layout with clearly numbered steps 1, 2, 3, 4 arranged top-to-bottom
Subject: must include all 4 steps:
  Step 1: 拉取并启动 docker 容器环境 (docker pull / docker run command illustration)
  Step 2: 在容器内安装并配置 hermes (installation & config file setup)
  Step 3: 接入 glmcodingplan (integration wiring between hermes and glmcodingplan)
  Step 4: 验证部署成功 (verification / health-check output)
Scene/backdrop: must include a dark terminal / IDE-style background to reinforce the dev environment context
Lighting/mood: needs a clean, high-contrast technical documentation mood — exact treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a dark-mode code-editor palette with accent highlights for step labels — exact colors are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include step labels "1", "2", "3", "4" prominently on each panel; must include section headers "docker 容器", "hermes", "glmcodingplan" as diagram labels
Constraints: must preserve logical sequential flow; all 4 steps must be visually distinct and clearly separated
Avoid: decorative non-technical illustration styles; handwritten or sketch aesthetics
